text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the central plaza<n>when I
spot Agnes Digital observing<n>King Halo from the
shadows.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh, King... I'm so worried... So<n>very, very
worried...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eek! How long have you been<n>standing there?!
I-I haven't done<n>anything, okay?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What a racket... What is happening<n>over here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, no, no! She's found me too!<n>It's over, it's
so over!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? It's you... I've seen you out of<n>the corner
of my eye several times<n>since morning. Do you
have business<n>with me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I, um, uhh... N-n-nope! No business<n>here!
choice_data_list:
Didn't you just say you were worried about
her?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Worried? About me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guh! It's come to this, I have no<n>choice but to
come clean and spill my<n>guts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, what worries me is that<n>your day
has been so different from<n>usual!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've been diligently training every<n>day for
your important scrimmage<n>today, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I have, yes. I'm surprised you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And yet, your entourage is away on a<n>trip—today
of all days!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, that's also correct...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, this means you didn't<n>receive your
customary morning King<n>Commendation, so your
whole day is<n>now in disarray!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why do you know so much about<n>me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Needless to say, I'm worried you<n>might not be in
top form!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might be right. I do feel thrown<n>off-kilter
having my routine disrupted.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
To remedy that, I bestow upon you<n>the honor of
commending me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That knowledge of yours proves to<n>me that
you're a true fan, so I can<n>think of no one better!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're giving me official permission<n>to
commend you?! I can't believe I've<n>been
blessed with such an honor!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your wish is my command! I shall<n>gladly take on
this mantle and cheer<n>for you with all my might!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I assume you're familiar<n>with my
call-and-response chant, but<n>let's see just how
well you know it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's my name?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What am I?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A winner!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: How's my future?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bright and beloved!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! For I am the one and<n>only—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Stupendous! I can't believe how<n>perfect your
responses were.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I am now brimming<n>with power!
Keep your eyes on me!<n>I'll be the one to emerge
victorious<n>today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, King! Look at how the light frames<n>her! She's
a literal angel!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
King Halo claims a flawless victory,<n>bathing in
Agnes Digital's fervent<n>cheers throughout the
race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? Where's Digital?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to thank her, but where<n>has she
gone?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After watching King Halo fly past the<n>finish line,
Agnes Digital left her spot<n>quietly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was an honor to aid you in your<n>victory, King...
There is no need for you<n>to thank me personally!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It'll be more than enough for me to<n>hear the King
Commendation again<n>starting tomorrow!
